benefits.description: Gets full very fast and does not crave bad foods; ate less because did not want to eat more
Lost over 30 pounds in 2 months without willingly restricting calories

protocol_notes: Previously used stimulants like Adderall for appetite suppression with significant side effects. Sourced from Peptide Sciences at ~$255/month for 2.4mg vial but using only 0.5mg. References Derek from More Plates More Dates as source of discovery.
